guidelines: This is a proctored examination. Any malpractice will result in disqualification.
The exam consists of multiple sections: MCQs and Coding Assessment.
You must attempt all sections. Marks are awarded only for correct answers.
For MCQ questions: Each correct answer awards +1 mark, incorrect/unattempted = 0 marks.
For Coding questions: Partial marks based on test cases passed.
You can navigate between questions within a section freely.
Once you submit a section, you CANNOT go back to it.
Use only the allowed programming languages for coding questions.
Do not attempt to switch windows, open other applications, or use external resources.
The exam will auto-submit when time expires.
Ensure stable internet connection throughout the exam.
Click 'I Agree & Continue' to proceed to the examination.

sections.name: Multiple Choice Questions
sections.instructions: Answer all 30 multiple choice questions. Each question carries 1 mark.

sections.name: Coding Assessment - Easy
sections.instructions: Solve coding problems. You can test your code against sample test cases before final submission.

sections.name: Coding Assessment - Medium
sections.instructions: Solve advanced coding problems. Hidden test cases will be evaluated after submission.
